Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************

 Equivalences for equifiers

 ************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.ContainsAdjEquiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Equifiers.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**

  Suppose, we have a diagram as follows


                        ---- f₁ ---->
     p₁ ---- i₁ ----> x₁              y₁
                        ---- g₁ ---->
     |                |               |
     |                |               |
     l₃      ≃        l₁     ≃        l₂
     |                |               |
     |                |               |
     V                V               V
                        ---- f₂ ---->
     p₂ ---- i₂ ----> x₁              y₂
                        ---- g₂ ---->


  where the columns are adjoint equivalences and both rows are equifier cones.
  If the top row is an equifier, then so is the bottom row.

 *)
Section EquifierEquivalence.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {p₁ x₁ y₁ p₂ x₂ y₂ : B}
          {e₁ : p₁ --> x₁}
          {f₁ g₁ : x₁ --> y₁}
          {α₁ β₁ : f₁ ==> g₁}
          {e₂ : p₂ --> x₂}
          {f₂ g₂ : x₂ --> y₂}
          {α₂ β₂ : f₂ ==> g₂}
          (ep₁ : e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁)
          (ep₂ : e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂)
          (cone₁ := make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁)
          (cone₂ := make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂)
          (lx : x₁ --> x₂)
          (ly : y₁ --> y₂)
          (lp : p₁ --> p₂)
          (Hlx : left_adjoint_equivalence lx)
          (Hly : left_adjoint_equivalence ly)
          (Hlp : left_adjoint_equivalence lp)
          (γ₁ : invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx))
          (γ₂ : invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly))
          (γ₃ : invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly))
          (H : has_equifier_ump cone₁)
          (pα : lx ◃ α₂ • γ₃
                =
                γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ _))
          (pβ : lx ◃ β₂ • γ₃
                =
                γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ _)).

  Let rx : x₂ --> x₁
    := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx.
  Let ηx : invertible_2cell (id₁ _) (lx · rx)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx.
  Let εx : invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ _)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx.

  Let ry : y₂ --> y₁
    := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly.
  Let ηy : invertible_2cell (id₁ _) (ly · ry)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly.
  Let εy : invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ _)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly.

  Let rp : p₂ --> p₁
    := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp.
  Let ηp : invertible_2cell (id₁ _) (lp · rp)
    := left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp.
  Let εp : invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ _)
    := left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp.

  
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ α₁ =
equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ β₁

  
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ α₁ =
equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ β₁

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
(equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ α₁) ▹ ly =
(equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ β₁) ▹ ly

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (lassociator (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx) f₁ ly)
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧

Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly

γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lassociator (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx) f₁ ly
• ((equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ α₁) ▹ ly) =
lassociator (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx) f₁ ly
• ((equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ β₁) ▹ ly)

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)

εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (lassociator (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx) f₁ ly)

      is_iso.
    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂

cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

lassociator (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx) f₁ ly
• ((equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ α₁) ▹ ly) =
lassociator (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx) f₁ ly
• ((equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ β₁) ▹ ly)

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
(equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ (α₁ ▹ ly))
• lassociator (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx) g₁ ly =
(equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ (β₁ ▹ ly))
• lassociator (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx) g₁ ly

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)

equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ (α₁ ▹ ly) =
equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx ◃ (β₁ ▹ ly)

εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx ◃ γ₂))
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx ◃ (α₁ ▹ ly))) =
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx ◃ γ₂))
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx ◃ (β₁ ▹ ly)))

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
is_invertible_2cell (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx ◃ γ₂))

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)

εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
is_invertible_2cell γ₂

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.

H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)

ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ rassociator rx lx f₂)
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx ◃ (lx ◃ α₂))) =
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ rassociator rx lx f₂)
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx ◃ (lx ◃ β₂)))

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ rassociator rx lx f₂)

      is_iso.

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧

is_invertible_2cell
  (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (εx ^-1 ▹ f₂))

(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (εx ^-1 ▹ f₂))
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx · lx ◃ α₂)) =
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (εx ^-1 ▹ f₂))
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx · lx ◃ β₂))

ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (εx ^-1 ▹ f₂))

      is_iso.
    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (εx ^-1 ▹ f₂))
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx · lx ◃ α₂)) =
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (εx ^-1 ▹ f₂))
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (rx · lx ◃ β₂))

cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)

equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ ((εx ^-1 ▹ f₂) • (rx · lx ◃ α₂)) =
equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ ((εx ^-1 ▹ f₂) • (rx · lx ◃ β₂))

cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)

rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ linvunitor f₂)
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (id₁ x₂ ◃ α₂)) =
(equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ linvunitor f₂)
• (equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (id₁ x₂ ◃ β₂))

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (linvunitor f₂ • (id₁ x₂ ◃ α₂)) =
equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ (linvunitor f₂ • (id₁ x₂ ◃ β₂))

pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)

εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)

(linvunitor f₂ • α₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ (id₁ x₂))
⋆⋆ id₂ (equifier_cone_pr1 q) =
(linvunitor f₂ • β₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ (id₁ x₂))
⋆⋆ id₂ (equifier_cone_pr1 q)

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)

B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ α₂ = equifier_cone_pr1 q ◃ β₂

    exact (equifier_cone_eq q).
  Qed.

  Definition has_equifier_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence_mor
             (q : equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂)
    : q --> p₂
    := equifier_ump_mor
         H
         (equifier_cone_pr1 q · rx)
         (has_equifier_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence_path q)
       · lp.

  Definition has_equifier_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence_pr1
             (q : equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂)
    : invertible_2cell
        (has_equifier_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence_mor q
         · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂)
        (equifier_cone_pr1 q)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
               _
               γ₁)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                     _
                     (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 H _ _))
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           _
                           εx)
                        (runitor_invertible_2cell _)))))).

  
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
has_equifier_ump_1 cone₂

  
B: bicat

Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly

γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)

εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
has_equifier_ump_1 cone₂

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
equifier_1cell q cone₂

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
B ⟦ q, cone₂ ⟧
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
invertible_2cell (?k · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂)
  (equifier_cone_pr1 q)

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
B ⟦ q, cone₂ ⟧
 exact (has_equifier_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence_mor q).
    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
q: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
invertible_2cell
  (has_equifier_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence_mor q
   · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂) (equifier_cone_pr1 q)
 exact (has_equifier_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence_pr1 q).
  Defined.

  Let γ₁' : invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
               _
               ηx)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                     _
                     (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        _
                        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           _
                           (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                           _
                           (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _))
                        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                              _
                              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                                 _
                                 εp))
                           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                              _
                              (lunitor_invertible_2cell _)))))))).

  Section UMP2.
    Context {z : B}
            (u₁ u₂ : z --> p₂)
            (ξ : u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂).

    Let ξ' : u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
      := fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
           (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
           (rassociator _ _ _
            • (_ ◃ γ₁^-1)
            • lassociator _ _ _
            • (rassociator _ _ _ ▹ _)
            • ((_ ◃ εp) ▹ _)
            • (runitor _ ▹ _)
            • ξ
            • (rinvunitor _ ▹ _)
            • ((_ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ _)
            • (lassociator _ _ _ ▹ _)
            • rassociator _ _ _
            • (_ ◃ γ₁)
            • lassociator _ _ _).

    Definition has_equifier_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell
      : u₁ ==> u₂
      := rinvunitor _
         • (_ ◃ εp^-1)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ _)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ εp)
         • runitor _.

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
has_equifier_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell ▹ e₂ =
ξ

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
has_equifier_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence_cell ▹ e₂ =
ξ

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
((((((rinvunitor u₁ • (u₁ ◃ εp ^-1))
     • lassociator u₁ rp lp)
    • (equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp))
   • rassociator u₂ rp lp) • (u₂ ◃ εp)) • runitor u₂)
▹ e₂ = ξ

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
((((((rinvunitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ((u₁ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
    • (lassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
   • ((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp) ▹ e₂))
  • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
• (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂) = ξ

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
(rinvunitor u₁ ▹ e₂)
• (((u₁ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂)
   • ((lassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
      • (((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp) ▹ e₂)
         • ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
            • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂)))))) =
ξ

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp) ▹ e₂)
• ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
   • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker e₂
   (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator u₁ rp lp)) ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker e₂
      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker u₁
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv εp))) ^-1
   • ((is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker e₂
         (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor u₁)) ^-1 • ξ))

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp) ▹ e₂)
• ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
   • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂))) =
(rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
• (((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • ((runitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ξ))

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
• (((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp) ▹ e₂)
   • ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
      • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂)))) =
lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
• ((rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
   • (((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • ((runitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ξ)))

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp

γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)

  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)

    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))

  • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
• (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂) =

B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B

f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧

α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)

ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)

u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
((((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp · e₂)
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
  • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
• (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂) =
(((lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
   • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
 • (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ

p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B

f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly

γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)

εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)

      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))

    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
(u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
• (((((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp · e₂)
      • lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
     • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
   • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂)) =
(u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
