B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
(((((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
    • (equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ lp · e₂))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
  • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
• (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂) =
(((((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1) • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
   • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
 • (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
(((((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁ · lx)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
  • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
• (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂) =
(((((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1) • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
   • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
 • (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
• ((((((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁ · lx)
       • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
      • lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
     • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
   • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂)) =
rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
• ((((((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
       • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
      • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
(((((rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
     • (equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁ · lx))
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
  • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
• (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂) =
(((((rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx • (u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
    • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
   • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
 • (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
(((((((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁) ▹ lx)
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
  • (rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
• (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂) =
(((((rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx • (u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
    • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
   • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)) • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂))
 • (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁) ▹ lx)
• (rassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx
   • ((u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂
         • ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
            • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂)))))) =
rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
• ((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
   • (lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
      • ((rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
         • (((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • ((runitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ξ)))))

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁) ▹ lx)
• (rassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx
   • ((u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂
         • ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
            • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂)))))) =
?b
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
?b =
rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
• ((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
   • (lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
      • ((rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
         • (((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • ((runitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ξ)))))

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
((equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁) ▹ lx)
• (rassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx
   • ((u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂
         • ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
            • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂)))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
(equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁) ▹ lx = ?y'

        
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
equifier_ump_cell H ξ' ▹ e₁ = ?t2

        exact (equifier_ump_cell_pr1 H ξ').
      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
(ξ' ▹ lx)
• (rassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx
   • ((u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂
         • ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
            • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂)))))) =
rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
• ((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
   • (lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
      • ((rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
         • (((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • ((runitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ξ)))))

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx
   • ((u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂
         • ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
            • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂))))))
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
ξ' ▹ lx =
(rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
 • ((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
    • (lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
       • ((rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
          • (((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)
             • ((runitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ξ)))))) • 
?Hε ^-1

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx
   • ((u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
      • (lassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂
         • ((rassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂)
            • (((u₂ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂) • (runitor u₂ ▹ e₂))))))

        
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
is_invertible_2cell εp

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
ξ' ▹ lx =
(rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
 • ((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
    • (lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
       • ((rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
          • (((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)
             • ((runitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ξ))))))
• (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx)
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (u₂ · rp)
           (is_invertible_2cell_inv γ₁))
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (u₂ · rp)
              lp e₂)
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker e₂
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator u₂
                    rp lp))
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker e₂
                    (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker u₂
                       εp))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker e₂
                    (is_invertible_2cell_runitor u₂)))))))
  ^-1

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
ξ' ▹ lx =
(rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
 • ((u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1)
    • (lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂
       • ((rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂)
          • (((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)
             • ((runitor u₁ ▹ e₂) • ξ))))))
• ((((((rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂) • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂) • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx)

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, p₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · e₂ ==> u₂ · e₂
ξ':= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map
  (adj_equiv_fully_faithful Hlx)
  ((((((((((((rassociator (...) e₁ lx
              • (... ◃ ...))
             • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
            • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
           • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • 
          (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
        • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂))
       • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
      • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
     • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂)
    • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
   • lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx): u₁ · rp · e₁ ==> u₂ · rp · e₁
ξ' ▹ lx =
(((((((((((rassociator (u₁ · rp) e₁ lx
           • (u₁ · rp ◃ γ₁ ^-1))
          • lassociator (u₁ · rp) lp e₂)
         • (rassociator u₁ rp lp ▹ e₂))
        • ((u₁ ◃ εp) ▹ e₂)) • (runitor u₁ ▹ e₂)) • ξ)
     • (rinvunitor u₂ ▹ e₂)) • ((u₂ ◃ εp ^-1) ▹ e₂))
   • (lassociator u₂ rp lp ▹ e₂))
  • rassociator (u₂ · rp) lp e₂) • (u₂ · rp ◃ γ₁))
• lassociator (u₂ · rp) e₁ lx

      apply fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map_eq.
    Qed.
  End UMP2.

  
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
has_equifier_ump_2 cone₂

  
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
has_equifier_ump_2 cone₂

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, cone₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ ==>
u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂
∑ ζ : u₁ ==> u₂, ζ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B

α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp

γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
