ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, cone₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ ==>
u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
q₁: φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
q₂: φ₂ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
φ₂ ▹ e₂ · rx =
lassociator u₁ e₂ rx
• ((ξ ▹ rx) • rassociator u₂ e₂ rx)

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, cone₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ ==>
u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
q₁: φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
q₂: φ₂ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
(is_invertible_2cell_lassociator u₁ e₂ rx) ^-1
• (φ₂ ▹ e₂ · rx) = (ξ ▹ rx) • rassociator u₂ e₂ rx

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, cone₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ ==>
u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
q₁: φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
q₂: φ₂ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
rassociator u₁ e₂ rx • (φ₂ ▹ e₂ · rx) =
(ξ ▹ rx) • rassociator u₂ e₂ rx

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, cone₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ ==>
u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
q₁: φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
q₂: φ₂ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
((φ₂ ▹ e₂) ▹ rx) • rassociator u₂ e₂ rx =
(ξ ▹ rx) • rassociator u₂ e₂ rx

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, cone₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ ==>
u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
q₁: φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
q₂: φ₂ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
(φ₂ ▹ e₂) ▹ rx = ξ ▹ rx

      
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
z: B
u₁, u₂: B ⟦ z, cone₂ ⟧
ξ: u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ ==>
u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
q₁: φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
q₂: φ₂ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone₂ = ξ
φ₂ ▹ e₂ = ξ

      exact q₂.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
has_equifier_ump cone₂

  
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
has_equifier_ump cone₂

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B

ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)

ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)

ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)

  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)

B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B

α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂

pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)

ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)

εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)

     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell

                 lx))

                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx

                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx

                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)

B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
has_equifier_ump_eq cone₂

    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
has_equifier_ump_1 cone₂
 exact has_equifier_ump_1_left_adjoint_equivalence.
    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
has_equifier_ump_2 cone₂
 exact has_equifier_ump_2_left_adjoint_equivalence.
    
B: bicat
p₁, x₁, y₁, p₂, x₂, y₂: B
e₁: B ⟦ p₁, x₁ ⟧
f₁, g₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
α₁, β₁: f₁ ==> g₁
e₂: B ⟦ p₂, x₂ ⟧
f₂, g₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
α₂, β₂: f₂ ==> g₂
ep₁: e₁ ◃ α₁ = e₁ ◃ β₁
ep₂: e₂ ◃ α₂ = e₂ ◃ β₂
cone₁:= make_equifier_cone p₁ e₁ ep₁: equifier_cone f₁ g₁ α₁ β₁
cone₂:= make_equifier_cone p₂ e₂ ep₂: equifier_cone f₂ g₂ α₂ β₂
lx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
ly: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lp: B ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
Hlx: left_adjoint_equivalence lx
Hly: left_adjoint_equivalence ly
Hlp: left_adjoint_equivalence lp
γ₁: invertible_2cell (lp · e₂) (e₁ · lx)
γ₂: invertible_2cell (lx · f₂) (f₁ · ly)
γ₃: invertible_2cell (lx · g₂) (g₁ · ly)
H: has_equifier_ump cone₁
pα: (lx ◃ α₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (α₁ ▹ ly)
pβ: (lx ◃ β₂) • γ₃ = γ₂ • (β₁ ▹ ly)
rx:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlx: B ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
ηx:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (id₁ x₁) (lx · rx)
εx:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlx: invertible_2cell (rx · lx) (id₁ x₂)
ry:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hly: B ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
ηy:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (id₁ y₁) (ly · ry)
εy:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hly: invertible_2cell (ry · ly) (id₁ y₂)
rp:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hlp: B ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
ηp:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (id₁ p₁) (lp · rp)
εp:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hlp: invertible_2cell (rp · lp) (id₁ p₂)
γ₁':= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) ηx)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
           (rp · e₁) lx rx)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
              (rassociator_invertible_2cell rp e₁
                 lx))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rp
                    (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ₁)))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell rx
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                       rp lp e₂))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                        e₂ εp))
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       rx
                       (lunitor_invertible_2cell
                        e₂)))))))): invertible_2cell (rp · e₁) (e₂ · rx)
has_equifier_ump_eq cone₂
 exact has_equifier_ump_eq_left_adjoint_equivalence.
  Defined.
End EquifierEquivalence.
